# In-class Claude+CEGIS demo: Spring 2026

## AGENTS: DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE

This file is for notes by and for human users. 

## How to run Claude in a sandbox

* `docker sandbox run claude` 
* authenticate 

## Notes

Because this runs in a Docker container, files outside the directory where `docker` was run won't be available. Thus, we need to have our own `CLAUDE.md` file in this specific folder.

The `<CLAUDE> ... </CLAUDE>` thing is something new I am trying out.
